purpose: Index workflow and pipeline metadata into a searchable local catalog so planners and recommendation engines can resolve candidate pipelines by domain, modality, or capability tags.

endpoints.description: Index a set of pipeline metadata records into a local searchable catalog.
Search the indexed catalog by workflow id, domain, modality, or free-text tags.

dependencies.purpose: Normalize pipeline metadata before indexing catalog entries

sidecar_specification.purpose: Build and query a local searchable pipeline catalog.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use when pipeline metadata from manifests or domain guidance should become searchable by planners or recommendation engines.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a distributed search cluster, execution queue, or raw YAML parser.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Gather normalized pipeline entries. 2) Call /pipeline-catalog/index. 3) Search the catalog through /pipeline-catalog/search from planning flows.

common_calls.description: Search the catalog for neuroscience workflows

failure_modes.condition: Entries are malformed or indexed without normalized identifiers and tags
failure_modes.symptom: Poor search recall or indexing rejection
failure_modes.recovery: Normalize pipeline metadata first and ensure domain or modality tags are present

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Index normalized workflow records by id, domain, modality, and free-text tags, then expose lightweight local search over the in-memory or persisted catalog.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Catalog quality collapses when raw guidance text and workflow ids are indexed without normalization, so derive canonical fields before indexing.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Keep catalog indexing and recommendation logic separate so one module stores searchable metadata and another ranks it.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not execute workflows or fetch remote catalogs from the indexer.

test_cases.name: index and search a neuroscience workflow
